purpose: Personal context restoration and attention management model validation.

classification_rules.Deadline: Time-bound event with meaningful loss if ignored.
classification_rules.Opportunity: Decision window where value can be captured or lost.
classification_rules.Context Change: New information changes future decisions or assumptions.
classification_rules.Monitoring: Object stays active but silent until conditions change.
classification_rules.Maintenance: Recurring or rare upkeep with date or risk pressure.
classification_rules.Noise: Generic update that should usually be suppressed.

watch_model.definition: A watch is object plus conditions plus expiration, not content.
watch_model.default_behavior: Monitor silently until a condition changes, a decision window opens, or expiration nears.

events.subject: namespace migration
events.title: 37 repos still not migrated before namespace freeze; before staff review
events.description: This is not a project update; it is the unresolved adoption count Mike would need before the next escalation path closes.
events.mike_relevance: Mike owns the posture of the migration, not the label of the migration project.
events.value_if_caught: A small nudge can unblock teams before the deadline becomes an executive problem.
events.loss_if_ignored: Late migration creates coordination churn and avoidable escalation.

promotion_rules.monitor: Deadline exists but is outside the useful action window.
promotion_rules.mention: Inside the window but no same-day decision is required.
promotion_rules.surface: Date pressure or missing prerequisite can change today's plan.
promotion_rules.lead_story: Rare, high-loss deadline with a concrete same-day posture change.

suppression_rules: Suppress when it does not change Mike's posture today.
Suppress when it is generic news without a personal decision hook.

events.subject: executive deck
events.title: Tuesday deck needs the risk narrative before review; after the tracker refresh
events.description: This belongs in the briefing when the narrative is the blocker, not when slides merely exist.
events.mike_relevance: Mike needs the decision-ready version before work fragments the day.
events.value_if_caught: Catching it early preserves time to turn scattered status into a clear ask.
events.loss_if_ignored: The meeting can turn into follow-up churn instead of a decision.

events.subject: critical KEV exposure
events.title: KEV blast radius grew after dependency inventory refresh; after owner silence
events.description: The important event is the change in blast radius, not a scanner headline.
events.mike_relevance: Security work becomes real when the exposure maps to owned services.
events.value_if_caught: Mike can separate true escalation risk from generic vulnerability noise.
events.loss_if_ignored: The day starts with stale risk assumptions.

promotion_rules.monitor: Track critical KEV exposure until practical impact is known.
promotion_rules.mention: Meaning changed, but it does not yet alter today's plan.
promotion_rules.surface: The change alters a near-term decision or assumption.
promotion_rules.lead_story: The change invalidates a default posture.

suppression_rules: Suppress when it does not change Mike's posture today.
Suppress when it is generic news without a personal decision hook.

events.subject: side-project direction
events.title: Side project has gone 14 days without a user-facing step; before another build cycle
events.description: The item matters when it changes whether Mike should keep investing attention.
events.mike_relevance: Mike wants side projects judged by momentum and fit, not backlog size.
events.value_if_caught: He can stop, ship, or narrow the next step with better context.
events.loss_if_ignored: A project becomes a quiet time sink.

promotion_rules.monitor: Track side-project direction until practical impact is known.
promotion_rules.mention: Meaning changed, but it does not yet alter today's plan.
promotion_rules.surface: The change alters a near-term decision or assumption.
promotion_rules.lead_story: The change invalidates a default posture.

suppression_rules: Suppress when it does not change Mike's posture today.
